 <https://bubble.io>

Hi Vincent,


 There’s never been a better time to turn your idea into a real product. Our

Agent can help you build the data and frontend workflows that take your app 
from sleek design to functional, shippable product.



 Plus, we just kicked off the Q1 Launch Program

Start monetizing mobile with in-app purchases (beta) 💸

set up a flow to charge users a simple subscription. Have an app idea you’ve 
been skiing on? Now’s the time to build.

See how it works  
<https://forum.bubble.io/t/new-feature-in-app-purchase-subscriptions-are-here-beta/390681>



 




Generate data and workflows from a prompt ✅

Learn more  
<https://forum.bubble.io/t/the-bubble-ai-agent-now-builds-workflows/390242>



 




Build API connections directly from the editor ⚡

UI a bit of a polish. Same powerful integrations, now right at your fingertips.

Check it out

Track your learning with streaks 🔥

Hi there,


To save on cloud resources I just did a scan of all our projects and identified those which have not seen sufficient activity for more than 7 days.

Your project Affiliate Marketing Automation (ID: ysnmukhhuedvshtuzjur) (https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/ysnmukhhuedvshtuzjur) from your organization VinceSelects was one of those and it is scheduled to be paused in a couple of days.

Your project is not currently paused but if it continues not to receive sufficient activity it will be pause.

Once a project is paused
- We will send another email confirm that it has been paused
- You can unpause it from the [dashboard](https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/ysnmukhhuedvshtuzjur) within 90 days of the pause date. Beyond that point, you won't be able to unpause your project, but you'll be able to download your data.

To prevent future automatic pausing, upgrade to Pro from your billing settings: https://supabase.com/dashboard/org/oarpnkjxldjkomkswwan/billing?panel=subscriptionPlan

For more information read the docs (https://supabase.com/docs/guides/platform/migrating-and-upgrading-projects#time-limits). Have questions? Submit a support ticket (https://supabase.help) and our team will help.


Happy Hacking!


Ant

Hi there,

First round of 2026 updates are in! This release helps Notion fit into your world even better. Work on the go, choose your AI models, and track what matters to your team.

**************************
AI Meeting Notes on mobile
**************************

AI Meeting Notes on mobile ( https://www.notion.com/mobile?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Whether you’re joining a call while commuting, brainstorming on your morning walk, or meeting without laptops, everything just works on mobile the way you’d hope. Start transcribing in one tap (even when you switch apps or lock your screen) and summarize everything in a shareable doc. Not on mobile yet? Get the Notion app here ( https://www.notion.com/mobile?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ).

******************************
Your Agent fits in your pocket
******************************

Your Agent fits in your pocket ( https://x.com/akothari/status/2007140306677055931?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Everything your Notion Agent can do on desktop, it now does on your phone. Build forms, create databases, search your company’s brain. Think of an item on your to-do list, hand it off to your agent, and it will work in the background while you move onto your next task. No more waiting. Here’s a live demo ( https://x.com/akothari/status/2007140306677055931?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) of what Notion Agent
can do.

***********************
New models, same memory
***********************

New models, same memory ( http://notion.so/?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

When a new model drops, it’s ready in Notion. You can now pick from GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, or Gemini 3. Or let Auto select the best model for the job. Switch between them freely while your context stays with you. Models will continue to change, but your memory in Notion doesn’t.

***************************************
Understand how your team uses Notion AI
***************************************

Understand how your team uses Notion AI ( http://notion.so/?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Enterprise admins now have clear visibility into AI usage over time. See who’s using it most, which features drive engagement, and where AI delivers value. Go to Settings → Analytics → AI to access. More insights coming soon.

****************
People Directory
****************

People Directory ( https://www.notion.com/help/people-directory?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

The new People Directory shows everyone in your workspace. It’s a pre-built database you can customize or import from HR systems (learn more ( https://www.notion.com/help/people-directory?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )). Check it out by searching for “People” or go to Settings → Members → View People Directory (it’s on the top right).

**************************
Do more with Notion & Jira
**************************

Do more with Notion & Jira ( https://www.notion.com/help/jira?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

The improved Jira integration ( https://www.notion.com/help/jira?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) is for teams where engineers live in Jira, but everyone else plans in Notion. Sync development work from Jira, then add your own Notion properties right alongside it—quarterly goals, customer feedback, revenue impact. Build dashboards that combine both, so you see the full picture. On Enterprise, edit key Jira fields directly from Notion and sync changes back automatically.

****************************
Multi-account on Notion Mail
****************************

Multi-account on Notion Mail ( https://www.notion.com/help/get-started-with-notion-mail?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io#download-notion-mail )

Manage multiple email addresses under one Notion account. Switch between personal and work inboxes easily. A lot of you have been waiting for this one, so thank you for your patience. We hope you give Notion Mail a try ( https://www.notion.com/help/get-started-with-notion-mail?utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io#download-notion-mail )!

*****************
More improvements
*****************

* Big desktop performance improvements: Pages on Windows open 27% faster, Mac desktop is up +11%.This chart ( https://x.com/ivanhzhao/status/2001834160198197305?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) is one of our most meaningful from 2025. * Hide Calendar panel: You can hide the context panel now for a full view of your calendar (see the demo ( https://x.com/NotionCalendar/status/1995939070154080553?s=20&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )).

* Confetti effect in automations: Add a little celebration for your automations — like this ( https://www.linkedin.com/posts/matthiasfrankprofile_so-i-guess-this-just-happened-notion-activity-7407336436582068224-Yzh3?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAASwbfgBDD6e1rYFMC4ggWjFn4pUkVaN0Vw&utm_campaign=What%27s+New+3.2&utm_campaignid=939&utm_campaigntype=seg_attr&utm_content=Email+1&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )!

Hi Vincent, 

Good news! You can now connect [Uncat](http://www.uncat.com) with [Karbon](https://karbonhq.com/) practice management software. 

😻 Import receipts from Karbon to Uncat. (i.e. Upload receipts to Karbon and Uncat will match them to transactions in QuickBooks Online.)

😻 Sync Uncat updates to Karbon timeline notes. (i.e. “Acme just updated 17 transactions.”)

😻 Create Karbon work items based on Uncat activity triggers. (i.e. When a client updates transactions in Uncat, create a work item for the assigned accountant user to categorize the transactions.)

Learn more in our [Guide to Uncat + Karbon](https://support.uncat.com/help/articles/8857618-uncat-and-karbon-integration).

To get started, paste your Karbon Access Key into Settings in Uncat and configure it to match your preferred workflows:

properties.content:
Hi Michael,

Just touching base regarding your last message, and first, pardon my late
reply. I was fairly busy yesterday, and I meant to get back to you sooner
today.

I also want to address your question directly and transparently.

We did have some issues with our previous factory. Over time, product
quality started to decline, and we ended up returning several units. As we
began reducing order volume and shifting production to a second supplier,
who delivers much better and more consistent quality, things became a bit
tense with them. This new supplier does cost us more to produce with, but
the increased cost is absolutely worth it for clients who value consistency
and overall quality.

I have also been made aware that the previous factory has been contacting
customers and presenting themselves as our official supplier. I am
currently addressing this directly with them to resolve the situation
properly. In the meantime, you can safely ignore those communications.
Regarding the comment about overdue payments, that is simply not accurate.
We pay for every order we place, and statements like that unfortunately do
not reflect reality.

I also want to clarify something regarding your order. I did reply
previously about using the measurements from your current system, but it
seems that message did not reach you. We are currently using a new
ticketing system for customer support, and there have been a few instances
where emails were either routed to spam or not delivered at all. This
appears to have been one of those cases. I apologize for that, we have
since resolved the issue on our end.

To confirm, yes, you can absolutely use the measurements from your current
system and simply add an inch to the back. That approach works perfectly.

Do you feel comfortable taking the measurements based on the diagram I
shared? The most important ones are:

full length
width at the hairline front
width at the center
width approximately one third to one quarter from the back

Ideally, all 7 measurements would be perfect, but having the full length
and these three widths is enough for us to accurately replicate your
current size.

Once I have those, we can move forward smoothly and keep your order
progressing.

I appreciate you reaching out directly and your continued trust over the
years, Michael. I will await your reply with the measurements.

Best,
Vincent
